summary: [BUG FIX VERIFICATION] PDF Cuaderno de Campo restructuring fully passes all user requirements. 13/13 backend pytest tests PASS. PDF for COT-GUI-25-001 (id 6a3e4b01e223c5dd1673c04c) is 94KB / 14 pages with the exact section order requested (Resumen+Índice+Datos Generales → Plantación → Toma de Datos → questionnaire sections → IMPRESOS+Calidad de Cepellones → 3 Tratamientos → 1 consolidated Ficha del Aplicador y Maquinaria at the end). NO Irrigaciones / NO Cosechas sections. The 3 tratamientos are ordered oldest→newest (2026-01-26, 2026-04-20, 2026-04-20) and labeled 'FITOSANITARIOS — Fungicida / Herbicida / Insecticida' (NO 'Sin tipo'). Visit ordering was verified on a temporary evaluation created against the visit-rich parcela (9 visits in correct chronological order 2026-01-26 → 2026-05-11). Footer 'Página X de Y' correctly reflects the actual page count on every page. Impresos anexo regression (Section 4 Calidad de Cepellones) is still present.

minor.issue: JIM evaluation's parcela_id (6a218f0793096b33669a2db7) has 0 visitas linked. The 9 existing visits with codigo COT-GUI-25-001 are on a different parcela (6a3e90f77b8cf2eb0d697bc1) than either evaluation references. This is a data inconsistency, not a PDF code bug — but it means the user-facing JIM PDF will show 'VISITAS (0)' until visits are re-linked to the correct parcela.

action_items: (Optional, data fix) Re-link the 9 existing visits on parcela 6a3e90f77b8cf2eb0d697bc1 to the correct evaluation's parcela_id, OR migrate the evaluation parcela_id, so the user sees visits on the COT-GUI-25-001 / JIM evaluations.

(Future enhancement, NOT a bug) If the user wants Visit-level cuestionario plagas/enfermedades printed in the PDF (item 7 of the original spec), the current code only prints the visita header + general fields — confirm whether the cuestionario detail rendering is in scope.
critical_code_review_comments: routes_evaluaciones.py is now 2081 lines — strongly recommend splitting PDF generation into a dedicated module (e.g. services/cuaderno_campo_pdf.py) with helpers per section. Maintainability concern raised in iteration 69 has grown.
Inline f-string HTML mixed with CSS makes the PDF logic hard to review/test; consider Jinja2 templates with WeasyPrint, especially as more sections are added.
Duplicate logic for loading aplicador/maquina images (file path / api/uploads URL) appears in both the per-treatment and the consolidated final section; extract into a helper.
Eval id is returned both at top-level and under 'data' depending on the route; clients have to fish for it. Standardize.
seed_data_creation: Temporary evaluation created against parcela 6a3e90f77b8cf2eb0d697bc1 (codigo TESTAGENT_VISIT_ORDER) inside the test fixture, used to render PDF for visit-order assertions, then deleted in the fixture teardown. No residual TESTAGENT_* rows remain.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend PDF restructuring is GOOD. All 8 user requirements met. The pytest suite /app/backend/tests/test_pdf_cuaderno_campo.py is fully self-contained (creates+cleans up a temp eval for the visits test). If new sections are added, extend the section-order test. Existing fixture data: COT-GUI-25-001 (6a3e4b01e223c5dd1673c04c) has 3 tratamientos with subtipo Herbicida/Fungicida/Insecticida — perfect for TIPO-label regressions. Parcela 6a3e90f77b8cf2eb0d697bc1 has 9 visits chronologically spread across Jan-May 2026 — use this for any visit-ordering test.
rca of the issue: The PDF Cuaderno de Campo bugs reported by the user are all FIXED. Verified via pdfplumber text extraction of two real evaluations + one temp evaluation: (a) ASC sort applied in routes_evaluaciones.py:766 (visitas) and :771 (tratamientos) takes effect; (b) treatment TIPO label uses tipo_tratamiento + subtipo at routes_evaluaciones.py:1240-1242, producing 'FITOSANITARIOS — Subtipo' as requested; (c) Irrigaciones/Cosechas section/index removal at routes_evaluaciones.py:796-797 + 1256-1257 verified — strings 'IRRIGACIÓN' and 'COSECHAS' absent from final PDFs; (d) consolidated Ficha del Aplicador y Maquinaria at routes_evaluaciones.py:1880-1995 appears exactly once on the LAST page (page 14 of 14 in COT PDF); (e) @page CSS counter(page)/counter(pages) at routes_evaluaciones.py:821 produces correct 'Página X de Y' footer on every page (verified 13/13 footers in temp eval, 14/14 in COT eval).
